name: Bentley DTC starter
default_source: Bentley VW Group ODIS shared / VAGCAN DTCs

dtcs.description: Bentley — KESSY antenna circuit fault
Bentley — Dynamic Ride 48 V actuator drive fault
Bentley — Air-suspension reservoir pressure too low
Bentley — Air-suspension level sensor implausible
Bentley Dynamic Ride: Pump Over-Time
repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

dtcs.description: Bentley Flying Spur Mulliner — Rear-wheel steering position implausible
Bentley V8 TFSI / W12 — Turbocharger overboost
Bentley V8 TFSI / W12 — Turbocharger underboost
Bentley V8 TFSI / W12 TSI — Cylinder 1 misfire detected
Bentley V8 / W12 — Cylinder 2 misfire detected
Bentley V8 / W12 — Cylinder 3 misfire detected
Bentley V8 / W12 — Cylinder 4 misfire detected
Bentley W12 — Cylinder 5 misfire detected
Bentley W12 — Cylinder 6 misfire detected
Bentley — Catalyst Bank 1 efficiency below threshold
Bentley W12 — Catalyst Bank 2 efficiency below threshold
Bentley — Engine oil pressure too low
Bentley — Camshaft phasing performance (Valvelift / chain stretch)
Bentley Hybrid — Hybrid battery pack deterioration
Bentley Hybrid — HV battery isolation fault
Bentley Hybrid — AC charging coupler latch fault (Type 2)
VarioCam Solenoid Stuck (W12 / V8)
repair_guidance: 1) Run live data: target vs actual cam advance per bank.
2) Check engine oil quality and level — VVT solenoids fail with old/dirty oil.
3) Inspect VVT solenoid screen for debris.
4) Replace solenoid; if mechanical (timing chain wear), open inspection.

dtcs.description: Bentley diesel-equivalent / Mulsanne — DPF efficiency below threshold
HV Battery Cell Imbalance (Continental GT Speed PHEV)
repair_guidance: 1) Check pack SOH, cell delta, and individual cell voltages.
3) Inspect HV connectors for corrosion / arcing damage.
4) Test pack isolation — replace damaged module if isolation low.

dtcs.description: Bentley — High-speed CAN bus 'A' off
Bentley — Lost Communication With Gateway 'A'
Bentley — Lost Communication With Bentley Rotating Display
